title: I wish it were Christmas everyday
description: Changes the normal chest texture into the Christmas one
body:
## Christmas chests

### What does it do?

This pack replaces the normal chest texture into the christmas one for the holiday spirit all year round!

Follow me on Twitter at @Subhiware

Subscribe to me on YouTube at @Subhiware

Thank you for choosing me, These Recource packs are made with a lot of love!
